name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage and Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe
notes:
This Building Block detects execution of of Dxcap.exe and also detects usage of "cdb.exe" to launch 64-bit shellcode or arbitrary processes or commands from a debugger script file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali
SIGMA Title: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of "cdb.exe" to launch 64-bit shellcode or arbitrary processes or commands from a debugger script file

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (update)
SIGMA Title: Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of of Dxcap.exe


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage and Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [cdb.exe or CDB.Exe or DXCap.exe]
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -c %') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -c %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -cf %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage and Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [cdb.exe or CDB.Exe or DXCap.exe]
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -c %') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -c %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -cf %') AQL filter query
